points: 祈使句用來表達命令、請求、指示或建議,句子以原形動詞開頭,主詞 you 省略不寫,例如 Close the door. 等於 (You) close the door.
否定祈使句一律用 Don't + 原形動詞,即使主詞概念上是第三人稱也用 Don't;be 動詞句型的否定是 Don't be... (例 Don't be late.),不可寫成 Aren't 或 Not be。
Let's + 原形動詞 (= Let us) 用來提出「我們一起做」的建議,否定為 Let's not + 原形;Let me + 原形則是「讓我來」,兩者意義不同不可混用。
祈使句 + and 表示「就會」帶來好結果 (Study hard, and you'll pass.);祈使句 + or 表示「否則」帶來壞結果 (Hurry up, or you'll miss the bus.),and 與 or 的選擇取決於後半句是正面還是負面結果。
notes.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 360 190" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="0" y="0" width="360" height="190" fill="#f3e7df"/><text x="12" y="26" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#3a342e">(You) Close the door.</text><rect x="12" y="34" width="42" height="18" fill="#eef4f2" stroke="#5aa874"/><text x="16" y="47" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#5aa874">You</text><text x="60" y="47" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#c9755c">省略主詞</text><line x1="120" y1="80" x2="120" y2="110" stroke="#3a342e" stroke-width="1.5"/><text x="40" y="76" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#3a342e">祈使句,</text><line x1="120" y1="95" x2="175" y2="75" stroke="#5aa874" stroke-width="1.5"/><line x1="120" y1="95" x2="175" y2="125" stroke="#d98072" stroke-width="1.5"/><text x="180" y="70" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#5aa874">and 好結果</text><text x="180" y="100" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#3a342e">就會…</text><text x="180" y="125" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#d98072">or 壞結果</text><text x="180" y="148" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#3a342e">否則…</text><text x="12" y="175" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#3a342e">否定:Don't + 原形動詞</text></svg>
notes.caption: 祈使句省略主詞 you,and 接正面結果、or 接負面結果。
notes.trap: ⚠ 否定祈使句要用 Don't(原形),不可用 Aren't / Doesn't;祈使句一律用原形動詞,不可加 s 或用 to。

notes.h: What 與 How 感嘆句
points: What 引導的感嘆句結構為 What + (a/an) + 形容詞 + 名詞 (+ 主詞 + 動詞)!,核心是「名詞」,例如 What a nice day (it is)!;可數單數名詞前要加 a/an。
How 引導的感嘆句結構為 How + 形容詞/副詞 (+ 主詞 + 動詞)!,核心是「形容詞或副詞」,後面不接名詞,例如 How beautiful (the flower is)!
判斷關鍵:看驚嘆的核心後面是否接名詞——接名詞用 What,只接形容詞或副詞用 How;同一句意常可用兩種改寫 (What a fast runner he is! = How fast he runs!)。
感嘆句語序為「主詞 + 動詞」正常順序(非疑問句倒裝);複數或不可數名詞用 What 時不加 a/an (What delicious food!、What cute dogs!)。
notes.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 360 190" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="0" y="0" width="360" height="190" fill="#eef4f2"/><text x="130" y="26" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#3a342e" text-anchor="middle">感嘆核心是什麼?</text><line x1="130" y1="34" x2="60" y2="66" stroke="#3a342e" stroke-width="1.5"/><line x1="130" y1="34" x2="230" y2="66" stroke="#3a342e" stroke-width="1.5"/><rect x="18" y="68" width="110" height="22" fill="#f3e7df" stroke="#c9755c"/><text x="73" y="83" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#c9755c" text-anchor="middle">後接名詞 → What</text><rect x="175" y="68" width="150" height="22" fill="#f3e7df" stroke="#5aa874"/><text x="250" y="83" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#5aa874" text-anchor="middle">只接形容詞副詞→ How</text><text x="12" y="118" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#3a342e">What a nice day!</text><text x="12" y="140" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#3a342e">How beautiful it is!</text><text x="12" y="168" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#f0a52e">單數可數名詞才加 a/an</text></svg>
notes.caption: 後面接名詞用 What,只接形容詞或副詞用 How。
notes.trap: ⚠ What 後面接複數或不可數名詞時不可加 a/an;感嘆句用正常語序「主詞+動詞」,不要寫成疑問句倒裝。

quiz.stem: Choose the correct way to tell a friend not to be nervous before the exam.
quiz.explanation: 否定祈使句用 Don't + 原形動詞,be 動詞句型寫成 Don't be nervous.。
quiz.trap: ⚠ be 動詞的否定祈使句不可用 Aren't;原形是 be,所以是 Don't be，不是 Don't are/is。

quiz.stem: "_____ a wonderful surprise you prepared for us!" Which word fits the blank?
quiz.explanation: 後接名詞片語 a wonderful surprise,用 What;surprise 為單數可數名詞前已有 a,所以選 What 而非 What an。
quiz.trap: ⚠ 空格後是「a + 形容詞 + 名詞」,核心是名詞用 What;若選 What an 會多一個冠詞,因為後面已有 a。

quiz.stem: Which sentence has the SAME meaning as "What a careful driver Mr. Lin is!"?
quiz.explanation: What a careful driver (名詞片語) 改成 How 句要把形容詞 careful 變副詞 carefully 並改用動詞 drives:How carefully Mr. Lin drives!。
quiz.trap: ⚠ 修飾動詞 drives 要用副詞 carefully,不可用形容詞 careful;(D) careless 語意相反。

quiz.stem: "Take the umbrella, _____ you'll get wet in the rain." Choose the best word.
quiz.explanation: 後半句「淋濕」是負面結果,祈使句 + or 表示「否則」,故選 or。
quiz.trap: ⚠ and 接正面結果、or 接負面結果;這裡 get wet 是壞結果,要用 or。

quiz.stem: Your team is tired. You want to suggest taking a break together. Which is most appropriate?
options: Let us to take a break.
quiz.explanation: 提議「我們一起」休息用 Let's (= Let us) + 原形動詞,Let's take a break.。
quiz.trap: ⚠ Let me 是「讓我來」只指自己;Let us 後接原形不加 to。建議大家一起做要用 Let's。

quiz.stem: Which underlined part is INCORRECT? "Don't talks so loudly in the library, please."
quiz.explanation: 祈使句用原形動詞,Don't 之後應接 talk 而非 talks。
quiz.trap: ⚠ 祈使句一律用原形,即使語氣像第三人稱也不可加 s;Don't 後永遠接原形。

quiz.stem: "_____ delicious the soup smells!" Choose the correct word.
quiz.explanation: 空格後是形容詞 delicious(無名詞),用 How;How + 形容詞 + 主詞 + 動詞 (How delicious the soup smells!)。
quiz.trap: ⚠ delicious 是形容詞、後面沒有名詞,所以用 How 不用 What;How 後絕不加 a/an。

quiz.stem: Choose the correct sentence.
options: What a beautiful flowers they are!
quiz.explanation: flowers 為複數名詞,用 What 時不加 a/an:What beautiful flowers they are!。
quiz.trap: ⚠ What 後接複數或不可數名詞時不加 a/an;有名詞就不能用 How。

quiz.stem: Rewrite "How fast that boy runs!" using What. Which is correct?
options: What a fast boy that boy is!
What a fast runner that boy is!
What a fast runs that boy!
quiz.explanation: How + 副詞 (fast) + 主詞 + 動詞 (runs) 改成 What 句,需把副詞變形容詞並補名詞 runner:What a fast runner that boy is!。
quiz.trap: ⚠ How fast he runs 改 What 句要造出名詞 (runner) 並用 is;不能直接套 runs。

quiz.stem: "Practice every day, _____ your English will improve a lot." Choose the best word.
quiz.explanation: 「英文進步」是正面結果,祈使句 + and 表示「就會」,故選 and。
quiz.trap: ⚠ 後半句是好結果 (improve),用 and;若用 or 語意會變成威脅式的壞結果。

quiz.stem: Which sentence is grammatically CORRECT?
options: Please don't to touch the paintings.
quiz.explanation: 禮貌否定祈使句:Please + Don't + 原形動詞,Please don't touch...。
quiz.trap: ⚠ Don't 後直接接原形,不加 to;祈使句不用 doesn't,please 可放句首或句尾。

quiz.stem: "_____ honest the little girl is!" and "_____ an honest girl she is!" Which pair fits the blanks?
quiz.explanation: 第一句後接形容詞 honest 用 How;第二句後接名詞片語 an honest girl 用 What。故為 How / What。
quiz.trap: ⚠ 同一形容詞 honest:單獨出現用 How,後面帶名詞 (girl) 則用 What。

quiz.stem: Mom is talking to a child. Choose the sentence that means "我們不要再吵架了。"
options: Let us not to quarrel anymore.
quiz.explanation: Let's 的否定是 Let's not + 原形動詞:Let's not quarrel anymore.。
quiz.trap: ⚠ Let's 的否定放 not 在 Let's 之後 (Let's not),不是 Let's don't;後接原形不加 to。

quiz.stem: Which underlined word makes the sentence WRONG? "What an useful information you gave me!"
quiz.explanation: information 是不可數名詞,What 後不可加 a/an,應為 What useful information...。(useful 雖以母音字母 u 開頭但發音為子音,本就該用 a 而非 an,但根本問題是不可數名詞不加冠詞。)
quiz.trap: ⚠ information 不可數,絕不加 a/an;同理 advice、furniture、news 都不可加冠詞。

quiz.stem: "_____ down your name and phone number here, please." Choose the best word.
quiz.explanation: 祈使句以原形動詞開頭:Write down your name...,please 表禮貌。
quiz.trap: ⚠ 祈使句開頭用原形 Write,不可用 V-ing、to V 或加 s。

quiz.stem: Which sentence correctly turns "It is a very interesting story." into an exclamation?
options: How an interesting story it is!
What an interesting story it is!
How a interesting story it is!
quiz.explanation: 核心名詞 story (單數可數),用 What + an + 形容詞 + 名詞:What an interesting story it is!。
quiz.trap: ⚠ 有名詞用 What;interesting 以母音開頭故用 an;How 後不接名詞。

quiz.stem: "Turn off the lights before you leave, _____ we'll waste electricity." Choose the best word.
quiz.explanation: 「浪費電」是負面結果,祈使句 + or 表「否則」,選 or。
quiz.trap: ⚠ waste electricity 是壞結果,用 or;and 會誤指這是好結果。

quiz.stem: Choose the sentence with the CORRECT word order.
quiz.explanation: 感嘆句用正常語序:How + 形容詞 + 主詞 + 動詞,How tall the tree is!。
quiz.trap: ⚠ 感嘆句不是疑問句,不可倒裝成 is the tree;主詞與動詞照正常順序 the tree is。

quiz.stem: A teacher wants students to be quiet but politely. Which is the most polite and correct?
quiz.explanation: 祈使句以原形 Be 開頭,加 please 表禮貌:Be quiet, please.。
quiz.trap: ⚠ 形容詞 quiet 前需要原形動詞 Be;不可用 are,主詞 you 要省略。

quiz.stem: "_____ hard you have worked this year!" Choose the correct word.
quiz.explanation: hard 在此為副詞修飾 worked,後面無名詞,用 How:How hard you have worked!。
quiz.trap: ⚠ hard 此處是副詞,不接名詞,要用 How;有 you have worked 的主詞動詞屬正常語序。

quiz.stem: Which sentence is the correct negative imperative for "不要對長輩無禮"?
options: Don't are rude to your elders.
Be not rude to your elders.
Don't be rude to your elders.
Not be rude to your elders.
quiz.explanation: 否定祈使句 + be 動詞:Don't be + 形容詞,Don't be rude to your elders.。
quiz.trap: ⚠ be 動詞祈使句的否定是 Don't be,不是 Be not 或 Don't are。

quiz.stem: Combine into one exclamation: The cake is so sweet. (Use What) Which is correct?
options: What a sweet cake it is!
How a sweet cake it is!
What sweet a cake it is!
quiz.explanation: cake 為單數可數名詞,What + a + 形容詞 + 名詞:What a sweet cake it is!。
quiz.trap: ⚠ 冠詞 a 要放在形容詞之前 (a sweet cake);單數可數名詞不可省 a。

quiz.stem: "Wear your seatbelt, _____ you may get hurt in an accident." Which word best completes it?
quiz.explanation: 「受傷」是負面結果,祈使句 + or 表「否則」,選 or。
quiz.trap: ⚠ get hurt 是壞結果,用 or;若用 and 會誤導成正面結果。

quiz.stem: Which of the following is an INCORRECT sentence?
options: What lovely weather we have today!
How lovely the weather is today!
What a lovely weather we have today!
quiz.explanation: weather 是不可數名詞,What 後不可加 a:應為 What lovely weather...,故 (C) 錯誤。
quiz.trap: ⚠ weather 不可數,加 a 即錯;判斷感嘆句正誤先確認名詞可數性。

quiz.stem: Read the sign: "KEEP OFF THE GRASS. DO NOT PICK THE FLOWERS." What does the sign ask people to do?
options: Walk on the grass and pick flowers.
Stay off the grass and leave the flowers alone.
Water the grass and the flowers.
quiz.explanation: Keep off the grass = 勿踏草坪;Do not pick the flowers = 不要採花,故要求人們遠離草坪並別摘花。
quiz.trap: ⚠ Keep off 是「遠離/勿進入」,Do not pick 是否定祈使句「不要採」;兩個都是禁止,不是允許。
